title: A Big Interview at the Hospital
article_text: I have a serious interview today at a big hospital. The hospital is in the capital city, and it is very popular. I feel a little fear, but my aim is to do my best. The interviewer asks me a specific question about my degree. I pull a red card from my bag and give a quick answer. We reach an agreement about my new job. The hospital wants a quick release of my tax information. There is a beautiful view from the window of the television room. The doctor below my office always has a solution for every problem. I am sorry, but I cannot stay for the movie discussion tonight.
